major_fixes_applied: Fixed fiche open crash by normalizing core array fields
Added UTF-8 strict envelope import script
Fixed JSON export to resolve ingredient prices from supplier list pre-serialization

export_flow.price_resolution: resolved from supplier list before export

strengths: Schema is mostly consistent and importable
HACCP/DLC metadata exists on a significant subset
Exported prices improved when supplier mapping exists
known_gaps: Ingredient-to-product mapping is incomplete on part of the catalog
Residual text encoding artifacts exist on a limited subset
PDF is suitable for human reading but not as primary machine source

validation: Hard-validate required arrays and primitive types
Reject malformed IDs and unparseable dates

product_resolution.fallback: supplier_id + normalized product name with review queue

price_policy: Fallback to product master lookup when supplier_product_id exists
provenance: Track field provenance: from_export or from_master

phase_1_acceptance_criteria: JSON v1.1 ingest succeeds on >95% fiches without blocking errors

do_not_use: Ad-hoc PowerShell JSON POST with non-UTF-8 string bodies
